body.title: CLOSED: sprint-ticket: pre-filter pytest output before Claude ingests it
body.result: grep -A5 FAIL|ERROR|assert|Exception | head 120 replaces tail -20 in sprint-ticket step 8; synced to skills/ repo (45c9f16)
body.description:
Update sprint-ticket Step 8 (test) to pre-filter pytest output: `python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | grep -A 5 -E 'FAIL|ERROR|assert|Exception' | head -120 || true`. Replace the current `| tail -20`. The grep pattern captures failure-relevant lines + 5 lines after each match for traceback context. When the suite passes cleanly, grep returns nothing — that's the pass signal. Add `|| true` to prevent false failure when grep matches nothing.

**Affected files:** `/home/akien/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket` (Step 8 test command)
**Design rules:** `|| true` prevents pipeline false-failure on clean pass; grep -A 5 captures enough traceback context; head -120 caps output if many failures
**Scope boundary:** IN — sprint-ticket Step 8 command only. OUT — no test suite changes, no other skills.
**Test plan:** known-failing test: grep captures failure + traceback; passing suite: empty output (pass signal); no functional regression on existing sprint flow
